This gives the room for an attacker to insert unwanted attributes to the XML/HTML. ## Detail Malicious Input ``` { a: { "@_attr": '" onClick="alert(1)' } } ``` Output ```xml ``` ### Workarounds If you're not ignoring attributes then keep processEntities flag true.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00209, "percentile": 0.10929}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T16:29:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44665"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T16:16:59Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T16:29:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder/security/advisories/GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44665", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder/security-advisories/GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder", "summary": "fast-xml-builder allows attribute values with unwanted quotes to bypass malicious or unwanted attributes", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:37:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "fast-xml-builder"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: fast-xml-builder allows attribute values with unwanted quotes to bypass malicious or unwanted attributes
